heading: Cooloola Cove vs Cooloolabin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooloola Cove, Queensland and Cooloolabin, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooloola Cove has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Cooloolabin (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooloola Cove or Cooloolabin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooloola Cove has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Cooloolabin scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooloola Cove scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Cooloolabin scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooloola Cove or Cooloolabin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooloola Cove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
